topics.title: Iran Negotiations
topics.summary: Donald Trump is actively involved in negotiations regarding a potential deal with Iran, emphasizing the importance of not rushing the process. He has stated that the blockade on Iran will remain in full force until a satisfactory agreement is reached. The discussions are described as proceeding in an orderly and constructive manner, with hopes for a significant peace agreement that includes various Middle Eastern countries.
topics.summaryZh: 唐纳德·特朗普积极参与关于与伊朗潜在协议的谈判，强调不急于达成协议的重要性。他表示，针对伊朗的封锁将继续全面实施，直到达成令人满意的协议。讨论被描述为有序和建设性地进行，期待包括多个中东国家在内的重要和平协议。

topics.title: Political Violence and Security
topics.summary: Recent events have highlighted concerns over political violence, particularly a shooting incident near the White House. Trump has expressed gratitude towards the Secret Service and law enforcement for their swift actions in response to the threat. This incident has raised discussions about the safety and security of political figures and the need for enhanced protective measures.
topics.summaryZh: 最近的事件突显了对政治暴力的担忧，特别是在白宫附近发生的枪击事件。特朗普对特勤局和执法部门迅速应对威胁表示感谢。此事件引发了关于政治人物安全和需要加强保护措施的讨论。

topics.title: Trump Family Events
topics.summary: Donald Trump Jr. recently celebrated his marriage to Bettina Anderson in a private ceremony in the Bahamas. This event has garnered media attention, with various outlets covering the details of the wedding. The Trump family continues to be a focal point in public discussions, with their personal milestones often intersecting with political narratives.
topics.summaryZh: 唐纳德·特朗普 Jr. 最近在巴哈马举行了与贝蒂娜·安德森的婚礼，私人仪式引起了媒体的关注，多个媒体报道了婚礼的细节。特朗普家族继续成为公众讨论的焦点，他们的个人里程碑常常与政治叙事交织在一起。

summary24h.text: 参加了会议并发表了演讲。
在社交媒体上发布了最新声明。
感谢特勤局和执法部门在白宫附近的枪击事件中迅速采取行动。
关于与伊朗的潜在协议发表声明，强调不急于达成协议。

socialMedia.text: One of the worst deals ever made by our Country was the Iran Nuclear Deal, put forth and signed into existence by Barack Hussein Obama and the rank amateurs of the Obama Administration. It was a direct path to Iran developing a Nuclear Weapon. Not so with the transaction currently being negotiated with Iran by the Trump Administration - THE EXACT OPPOSITE, in fact! The negotiations are proceeding in an orderly and constructive manner, and I have informed my representatives not to rush into a deal in that time is on our side. The Blockade will remain in full force and effect until an agreement is reached, certified, and signed. Both sides must take their time and get it right. There can be no mistakes! Our relationship with Iran is becoming a much more professional and productive one. They must understand, however, that they cannot develop or procure a Nuclear Weapon or Bomb. I would like to thank, thus far, all of the countries of the Middle East for their support and cooperation, which will be further enhanced and strengthened by their joining the Nations of the historic Abraham Accords and, who knows, perhaps the Islamic Republic of Iran would like to join, as well! Thank you for your attention to this matter. President DONALD J. TRUMP
socialMedia.textZh: 我们国家曾经达成的最糟糕的协议之一就是伊朗核协议，这是由巴拉克·侯赛因·奥巴马和奥巴马政府的业余人士提出并签署的。这是伊朗发展核武器的直接途径。而特朗普政府目前与伊朗谈判的交易则完全相反！谈判正在有序且建设性地进行，我已告知我的代表们不要急于达成协议，因为时间在我们这边。封锁将保持全面有效，直到达成协议、得到认证并签署。双方必须慢慢来，确保没有错误！我们与伊朗的关系正在变得更加专业和富有成效。然而，他们必须明白，他们不能发展或获取核武器或炸弹。我想感谢迄今为止所有中东国家的支持与合作，这将通过他们加入历史性的亚伯拉罕协议国家而进一步增强和巩固，谁知道，也许伊朗伊斯兰共和国也想加入！感谢您对此事的关注。总统唐纳德·J·特朗普

socialMedia.text: The Dumocrats don’t want to allow FISHING. Fighting us in Court. Bad for the environment. Amazing! President DJT
socialMedia.textZh: 民主党人不想允许钓鱼。正在法庭上与我们对抗。对环境有害。真是惊人！总统DJT

socialMedia.text: This is a bad (Sick!) group of people. Very destructive to our great Nation. Caused tremendous damage through Weaponization! President DJT
socialMedia.textZh: 这是一群糟糕（病态！）的人。对我们伟大的国家非常具有破坏性。通过武器化造成了巨大的损害！总统DJT

socialMedia.text: “Birthright Citizenship is suicide for our Country!” Mark Levin
socialMedia.textZh: “出生公民权对我们的国家来说是自杀！”马克·莱文

socialMedia.text: Thank you to our great Secret Service and Law Enforcement for the swift and professional action taken this evening against a gunman near the White House, who had a violent history and possible obsession with our Country’s most cherished structure. The gunman is dead after an exchange of gunfire with Secret Service Agents near the White House gates. This event is one month removed from the White House Correspondent’Dinner shooting, and goes to show how important it is, for all future Presidents, to get, what will be, the most safe and secure space of its kind ever built in Washington, D.C. The National Security of our Country demands it!
socialMedia.textZh: 感谢我们伟大的特勤局和执法部门今晚对白宫附近一名有暴力历史和可能对我们国家最珍贵的建筑物产生痴迷的枪手采取的迅速和专业的行动。该枪手在与特勤局特工在白宫大门附近的交火中被击毙。此事件距白宫记者晚宴枪击事件仅一个月，表明对未来所有总统来说，确保华盛顿特区建立最安全、最安全的空间是多么重要。我们国家的国家安全要求如此！

socialMedia.text: The Democrats just released an “Autopsy” of their 2024 Presidential Campaign, typos and all, but they refused to discuss two very important words, BAD POLICY. The candidates, Sleepy Joe and then, Kamala, weren’t so “HOT” either! President DJT
socialMedia.textZh: 民主党刚刚发布了他们2024年总统竞选的“尸检报告”，包括拼写错误，但他们拒绝讨论两个非常重要的词，糟糕的政策。候选人，昏昏欲睡的乔和卡马拉，也没有那么“火热”！总统DJT

socialMedia.text: I am in the Oval Office at the White House where we just had a very good call with President Mohammed bin Salman Al Saud, of Saudi Arabia, Mohammed bin Zayed Al Nahyan, of The United Arab Emirates, Emir Tamim bin Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani, Prime Minister Mohammed bin Abdulrahman bin Jassim bin Jaber Al Thani, and Minister Ali al-Thawadi, of Qatar, Field Marshal Syed Asim Munir Ahmed Shah, of Pakistan, President Recep Tayyip Erdoğan, of Türkiye, President Abdel Fattah El-Sisi, of Egypt, King Abdullah II, of Jordan, and King Hamad bin Isa Al Khalifa, of Bahrain, concerning the Islamic Republic of Iran, and all things related to a Memorandum of Understanding pertaining to PEACE. An Agreement has been largely negotiated, subject to finalization between the United States of America, the Islamic Republic of Iran, and the various other Countries, as listed. Separately, I had a call with Prime Minister Bibi Netanyahu, of Israel, which, likewise, went very well. Final aspects and details of the Deal are currently being discussed, and will be announced shortly. In addition to many other elements of the Agreement, the Strait of Hormuz will be opened. Thank you for your attention to this matter! President DONALD J. TRUMP
socialMedia.textZh: 我在白宫的椭圆形办公室，刚刚与沙特阿拉伯的穆罕默德·本·萨勒曼王储、阿联酋的穆罕默德·本·扎耶德·阿尔·纳哈扬、卡塔尔的哈马德·本·哈利法·阿尔·萨尼王储、卡塔尔的穆罕默德·本·阿卜杜拉赫曼·本·贾西姆·本·贾伯·阿尔·萨尼总理、巴基斯坦的赛义德·阿西姆·穆尼尔·艾哈迈德·沙赫元帅、土耳其的雷杰普·塔伊普·埃尔多安总统、埃及的阿卜杜勒·法塔赫·塞西总统、约旦的阿卜杜拉二世国王和巴林的哈马德·本·伊萨·阿尔·哈利法国王进行了非常好的通话，讨论了伊朗伊斯兰共和国及与和平相关的谅解备忘录。协议已基本谈妥，待美国、伊朗伊斯兰共和国及其他列出的国家最终确认。此外，我还与以色列的内塔尼亚胡总理进行了通话，同样进展良好。交易的最终细节目前正在讨论中，并将很快公布。除了协议的许多其他要素外，霍尔木兹海峡将被开放。感谢您对此事的关注！总统唐纳德·J·特朗普

socialMedia.text: RT @realPatriotFreedomProjectThe same Dems and anti-Trumpers who are melting down over pardons now didn’t say a word while Americans were getting buried under unjust prison sentences, financially destroyed, and politically targeted by a weaponized justice system.Funny how “mercy” suddenly matters now.I’ve watched prosecutors try to turn ordinary convictions into life-destroying sentences. I’ve watched families get crushed while the media shrugged because the defendant’s politics made them easy to hate.Some were innocent. Some were clearly overcharged. Many never stood a fair chance against the machine.Pardons and clemency exist because the system isn’t perfect and pretending otherwise is dangerous.That’s what our latest Weaponization Watch piece is about. @realDonaldTrump open.substack.com/pub/patriotfre…
socialMedia.textZh: 转发 @realPatriotFreedomProject 同样的民主党人和反特朗普者现在对赦免感到崩溃，但在美国人被不公正的监禁判决埋没、经济被摧毁、以及被武器化的司法系统政治打击时，他们却没有说一句话。奇怪的是，“仁慈”现在突然变得重要。我看到检察官试图将普通的定罪转变为毁灭人生的判决。我看到家庭被压垮，而媒体对此无动于衷，因为被告的政治立场让他们容易被仇恨。有些人是无辜的。有些人显然被过度指控。许多人在这个机器面前根本没有公平的机会。赦免和宽恕的存在是因为系统并不完美，假装其他情况是危险的。这就是我们最新的武器化观察文章的主题。@realDonaldTrump open.substack.com/pub/patriotfre…
